title: Saudi Arabian Red Bean Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful tagine made with red beans, inspired by traditional Saudi Arabian cuisine.
instructions: Heat oil in a tagine or large pot over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the red bean paste, fermented red bean, and Arabian spices; stir to combine.
Add the wheat and stir to combine.
Add water to cover the mixture and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let the tagine rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve with a side of flatbread or rice, if desired.
